RE-ADJUDICATION REQUEST

REJECTION DETAILS:
  [BE-1-3] – 1 service(s) rejected:
    • 21/02/2026 | 96092-ERR – UNKNOWN SERVICE

  APPEAL JUSTIFICATION (BE-1-3):
  CONTRACTUAL COMPLIANCE APPEAL: The service codes have been reviewed against the contractual agreement. Corrected service codes are provided per the agreed tariff schedule. We request re-adjudication under the correct code mapping.
  Supporting Documents: Correct NPHIES service code mapping, contract reference

  [BE-1-4] – 5 service(s) rejected:
    • 21/02/2026 | N00006 – CONSULTATION FEE (SPECIALIST).
    • 21/02/2026 | B01375 – SERUM CREATININE
    • 21/02/2026 | B00737 – GLYCOSELATED HEMOGLOBIN (HBA IC)
    • 21/02/2026 | B00642 – FASTING BLOOD SUGAR (FBS)
    • 21/02/2026 | B00113 – ALANINE AMINOTRANSFERASE (ALT/SGPT)

  APPEAL JUSTIFICATION (BE-1-4):
  PREAUTHORIZATION APPEAL: The service was provided without prior authorization due to clinical urgency / administrative oversight. We hereby submit a retroactive preauthorization request with full clinical justification as required under ART PreAuth Protocol – General Requirements. All supporting clinical documentation is attached.
  Supporting Documents: Medical report, clinical notes, diagnosis confirmation, treatment plan
